settings.text:
At Beg Borrow Steal Studio, every piece is thoughtfully sourced and carefully curated for its rarity, authenticity and enduring appeal. Our collection includes authenticated designer treasures, vintage jewellery, handbags, watches, sunglasses, antiques, home curios and exceptional deadstock fashion sourced from exclusive auctions, private collections and special acquisitions worldwide.

Due to the exclusive and often one-of-a-kind nature of our inventory, all sales are considered final. We encourage clients to review product descriptions, measurements, condition notes and photographs carefully before making a purchase.


Returns & Refunds
We do not offer refunds on any purchases.


Exchanges
Exchanges may only be considered in the rare event that an item arrives damaged, defective, or materially different from the description provided on our website.

To request an exchange, clients must:

• Contact our team within 48 hours of receiving their order.
• Provide clear photographs of the item, packaging and proof of purchase.
• Retain all original packaging, tags, accessories and authenticity documentation.

Once reviewed and approved by our team, the item may be exchanged for store credit or another available item of equal value, subject to availability.


Conditions for Exchange Approval
To be eligible for exchange consideration, the item must:

• Be unused, unworn and in the same condition in which it was received.
• Include all original packaging, tags, dust bags, boxes, accessories and certificates where applicable.
• Be returned with any authenticity documentation supplied by Beg Borrow Steal Studio.

Items returned without original components or showing signs of wear, use, alteration or damage after delivery will not be accepted.


Vintage & Deadstock Characteristics
Beg Borrow Steal Studio specialises in authentic vintage pieces and exceptional deadstock treasures. While our deadstock products are unused, some items may naturally exhibit minor signs of ageing consistent with their age, storage history or original manufacturing process.

Similarly, vintage jewellery, handbags, watches, antiques and collectibles may display subtle characteristics that reflect their history and authenticity. These features are considered part of the item's unique charm and are not regarded as defects.

For this reason, exchanges will not be accepted for:

• Change of mind.
• Personal preference.
• Sizing or fit concerns.
• Minor signs of ageing, patina or wear consistent with vintage items.
• Natural characteristics associated with deadstock pieces.


Product Imagery & Colour Accuracy
We make every effort to accurately represent each item through detailed descriptions and photography. However, colours and textures may vary slightly due to lighting conditions, photography and individual screen settings.

Such variations do not qualify for exchange or store credit.


Final Sale Items
The following purchases are strictly final sale and are not eligible for exchange, store credit or refund:

• Custom or special-order items.
• Limited-edition pieces.
• Sale items.
• Discounted purchases.
• Promotional purchases.


Authenticity Guarantee
Every designer item offered by Beg Borrow Steal Studio is carefully authenticated through trusted third-party authentication platforms, including Legit Grails and Real Authentication. Where applicable, authenticity certificates and documentation accompany the purchase, providing complete confidence and transparency.


Right to Refuse
Beg Borrow Steal Studio reserves the right to decline any exchange request that does not comply with the conditions outlined in this policy.


Contact Us
For any questions regarding your purchase, delivery or product information, our team will be delighted to assist you.

Thank you for supporting conscious luxury, timeless craftsmanship and thoughtfully curated treasures from around the world.
